[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up anime-style illustration shows a person with red hair and a bandaged, striped mouth area looking slightly to the side.

The main subject is a human-like character portrayed from the shoulders up, with deep red hair framing the face and falling to the sides. A gray, bandage-like structure covers part of the nose and mouth area, with multiple horizontal stripes visible. The character has sharp eyebrows, partially lidded eyes, and an open mouth line obscured by the bandage covering. A small dark dot or mark appears near the lower cheek area. The person wears a light-colored garment with a dark collar or tie-like detail at the neck, and a pinkish cloth or covering is visible at the bottom edge of the image near the chin and shoulders. The character’s head is turned to the left, with the face angled in profile toward the left side of the frame.

The setting appears to be a simple indoor or background blur, consisting of a muted brown and beige gradient with no clearly identifiable environment details. Lighting is soft and even, consistent with an illustrated scene, and the background remains unobtrusive.

Visual Details:
The dominant colors are red (hair), gray (bandage stripes around the mouth and nose area), light blue/gray (collar or upper clothing), and pink (cloth at the lower foreground). The camera angle is close and slightly tilted, creating an intense, face-filling composition. Hair strands are outlined with dark lines and show strong shading. The gray striped bandage has a layered, fabric-like look.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image is a close-up anime-style portrait focused on a red-haired character with a striped bandage covering the mouth and nose. The background is plain and muted, keeping attention on the character’s face and upper clothing.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
